com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.card.magcard

Class MagCardInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.card.magcard.MagCardInfo

  • public class MagCardInfo
extends java.lang.Object
    Magnetic stripe card info.

    • Method Detail

      • getTrack1Data

        public byte[] getTrack1Data()
        Gets track 1 data.
        Returns:
        Track 1 data. It could be plaintext or ciphertext.

      • setTrack1Data

        public void setTrack1Data(byte[] track1Data)
        Sets track 1 data.
        Parameters:
        track1Data - Track 1 data. It could be plaintext or ciphertext.

      • getTrack2Data

        public byte[] getTrack2Data()
        Gets track 2 data.
        Returns:
        Track 2 data.It could be plaintext or ciphertext.

      • setTrack2Data

        public void setTrack2Data(byte[] track2Data)
        Sets track 2 data.
        Parameters:
        track2Data - Track 2 data. It could be plaintext or ciphertext.

      • getTrack3Data

        public byte[] getTrack3Data()
        Gets track 3 data.
        Returns:
        Track 3 data. It could be plaintext or ciphertext.

      • setTrack3Data

        public void setTrack3Data(byte[] track3Data)
        Sets track 3 data.
        Parameters:
        track3Data - Track 3 data. It could be plaintext or ciphertext.

      • getPanData

        public byte[] getPanData()
        Gets PAN data.
        Returns:
        PAN data.
        • PAN data is plaintext returned by internal card reader.
        • PAN data could be encrypted when using external card reader.

      • setPanData

        public void setPanData(byte[] panData)
        Sets PAN data.
        Parameters:
        panData - PAN data.
        • PAN data is plaintext returned by internal card reader.
        • PAN data could be encrypted when using external card reader.

      • getFirstClearPAN

        public java.lang.String getFirstClearPAN()
        Gets first clear part of masked PAN.
        Returns:
        First clear part of masked PAN. This only returned when PAN data is encrypted.

      • setFirstClearPAN

        public void setFirstClearPAN(java.lang.String firstClearPAN)
        Sets first clear part of masked PAN.
        Parameters:
        firstClearPAN - First clear part of masked PAN. This only returned when PAN data is encrypted.

      • getLastClearPAN

        public java.lang.String getLastClearPAN()
        Gets last clear part of masked PAN.
        Returns:
        Last clear part of masked PAN. This only returned when PAN data is encrypted.

      • setLastClearPAN

        public void setLastClearPAN(java.lang.String lastClearPAN)
        Sets last clear part of masked PAN.
        Parameters:
        lastClearPAN - Last clear part of masked PAN. This only returned when PAN data is encrypted.

      • getPlainPANLen

        public int getPlainPANLen()
        Gets length of plain PAN.
        Returns:
        Length of plain PAN.

      • setPlainPANLen

        public void setPlainPANLen(int plainPANLen)
        Sets length of plain PAN.
        Parameters:
        plainPANLen - Length of plain PAN.

        public int getPlainTrack1DataLen()

        Returns:
